creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for how long it took for this to be reviewed.

FreeBSD 12 is out of support and emilua builds fine on FreeBSD 13.
In any case, if a port doesn't build because a dependency doesn't build, that's no reason to IGNORE the port.

Please extend pkg-descr to at least three lines.  Explain what the port does, what features it has and why one would pick this port over others.

Is this port still up to date?
